description: gRPC XDS provides Java support for xDS APIs in gRPC, enabling clients and servers to consume xDS-based service configuration, load balancing, routing, and security settings. It integrates with the grpc-java stack so JVM applications can participate in Envoy-style control-plane deployments.

grpc-xds provides the Java gRPC xDS plugin, adding xDS-based name resolution, load balancing, control-plane discovery, and related security/filter support for gRPC clients and servers. It lets JVM applications participate in service-mesh style traffic management by consuming xDS configuration and Envoy-compatible protocol resources.

It lets JVM applications participate in service-mesh style traffic management by consuming xDS configuration and Envoy-compatible protocol resources.
